text-muted-foreground">Where to find your values:</p><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b border-border"><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Value</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Where</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>client_id</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Register an OAuth2 app with Deriv — you&#x27;ll receive an app ID</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>redirect_uri</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Set during app registration — must match exactly</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>t / affiliate_token / sidi / ca (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your referral link or the Partners dashboard — use the exact parameter name shown there</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>utm_source / affiliate ID (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>utm_campaign (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>app_id (legacy)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your V1 app ID from legacy-api.deriv.com — only needed if you maintain a Legacy API app</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="troubleshooting">Troubleshooting</h2><div class="my-4"><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b border-border"><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Problem</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Likely cause</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Fix</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">State mismatch error</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">state in the callback doesn&#x27;t match stored value</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Store state in sessionStorage before redirecting, and don&#x27;t regenerate it on page load</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_grant on token exchange</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">code_verifier doesn&#x27;t match the challenge, or code expired/already used</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Send the original code_verifier, not a newly generated one; exchange the code immediately</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Redirect URI mismatch</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">URL doesn&#x27;t exactly match what&#x27;s registered</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Check for trailing slashes, http vs https, port numbers</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_client</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Wrong client_id</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your credentials from the Deriv dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Login form shows instead of signup</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing prompt=registration</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Add prompt=registration to the authorization URL</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Signup not tracked to partner</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing or wrong UTM parameters</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your tracking token parameter (one of t, affiliate_token, sidi, or ca) matches the one shown in your referral link, and that utm_source, utm_medium, and utm_campaign are all present and correct</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="implementation-checklist">Implementation checklist</h2><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="login-checklist">Login</h3><ul class="space-y-1.5 text-muted-foreground text-sm my-4 ml-2"><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">response_type</code> <!-- -->is<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">code</code></span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">client_id</code> <!-- -->and<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">redirect_uri</code> <!-- -->are registered with Deriv</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">code_challenge</code> <!-- -->and<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">state</code> <!-- -->are generated fresh for each request</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span>Callback verifies<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded inline-block"></span><span>Token exchange happens server-side (not in the browser)</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border text-muted-foreground">Where to find your values:</p><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b uppercase tracking-wide">Where</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>client_id</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Register an OAuth2 app with Deriv — you&#x27;ll receive an app ID</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>redirect_uri</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground whitespace-nowrap"><code>t / affiliate_token / sidi / ca (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your referral link or the Partners dashboard — ID (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>utm_campaign (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>app_id (legacy)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your V1 app ID from legacy-api.deriv.com — only needed if you maintain a Legacy API app</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="troubleshooting">Troubleshooting</h2><div class="my-4"><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b border-border"><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Problem</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Likely cause</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Fix</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">State mismatch error</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">state in the callback doesn&#x27;t match stored value</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Store state in sessionStorage before redirecting, and don&#x27;t regenerate it on page load</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_grant on token exchange</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">code_verifier doesn&#x27;t match the challenge, or code expired/already used</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Send the original code_verifier, not a newly generated one; exchange the code immediately</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Redirect URI mismatch</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">URL doesn&#x27;t exactly match what&#x27;s registered</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Check for trailing slashes, http vs https, port numbers</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_client</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Wrong client_id</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your credentials from the Deriv dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Login form shows instead of signup</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing prompt=registration</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Add prompt=registration to the authorization URL</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Signup not tracked to partner</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing or wrong UTM parameters</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your tracking token parameter (one of t, affiliate_token, sidi, or ca) matches the one shown in your referral link, and that utm_source, utm_medium, and utm_campaign are all present and correct</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="implementation-checklist">Implementation checklist</h2><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="login-checklist">Login</h3><ul class="space-y-1.5 text-muted-foreground text-sm my-4 ml-2"><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">response_type</code> <!-- -->is<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">code</code></span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 Generate a random code_verifier\\nconst array = crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(64));\\nconst codeVerifier = Array.from(array)\\n  .map(v =\u003e 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789-._~'[v % 66])\\n  .join('');\\n\\n// 2.   34: </span><span></span><span class="token" style="color:#569CD6">const</span><span> hash </span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">=</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#c586c0">await</span><span> crypto</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token property-access">subtle</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">digest</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token" style="color:#ce9178">&#x27;SHA-256&#x27;</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">,</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#569CD6">new</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#4ec9b0">TextEncoder</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">encode</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span>codeVerifier</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">;</span><span>
  35: </span><span></span><span class="token" style="color:#569CD6">const</span><span> codeChallenge </span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">=</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#dcdcaa">btoa</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token known-class-name" style="color:#4ec9b0">String</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">fromCharCode</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token spread" style="color:#d4d4d4">...</span><span class="token" style="color:#569CD6">new</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#4ec9b0">Uint8Array</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span>hash</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span>
  36: </span><span>  </span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">replace</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token regex-delimiter" style="color:#d16969">/</span><span class="token regex-source language-regex special-escape" style="color:#d16969">\+</span><span class="token regex-delimiter" style="color:#d16969">/</span><span class="token regex-flags" style="color:#d16969">g</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">,</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#ce9178">&#x27;-&#x27;</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span>

-----------------------------------

  43: </span>

  45: </span><span></span><span class="token dom" style="color:#9cdcfe">sessionStorage</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">setItem</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token" style="color:#ce9178">&#x27;pkce_code_verifier&#x27;</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">,</span><span> codeVerifier</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">;</span><span>

text-muted-foreground mb-4">Required authorization request parameters:</p><ul class="list-disc pl-5 mb-4 text-muted-foreground space-y-1"><li>response_type=code</li><li>client_id</li><li>redirect_uri</li><li>scope</li><li>state</li><li>code_challenge + code_challenge_method=S256 (PKCE)</li></ul><div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-lg border flex gap-3 items-start bg-surface-primary text-foreground border-border [--alert-semantic:rgb(var(--foreground))] [--alert-highlight:rgb(var(--foreground)/0.1)] px-4 py-3 my-6"><div class="flex items-start shrink-0 pt-0.5"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" style="color:var(--alert-semantic)">Storage tip</h5><div class="font-normal min-w-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:bg-[var(--alert-highlight)] [&amp;_code]:text-[var(--alert-semantic)] [&amp;_code]:px-1 [&amp;_code]:py-0.5 [&amp;_code]:rounded [&amp;_code]:font-mono [&amp;_code]:text-[0.9em]">Store the <code>code_verifier</code> and <code>state</code> in<!-- --> <code>sessionStorage</code> before redirecting — they survive the redirect and are automatically cleared when the tab is closed. Clear them from storage immediately after a successful token exchange.</div></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="step-2-redirect">Step 2: Redirect the user to the authorization endpoint</h2><p class="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4">Send users to Deriv&#x27;s OAuth 2.0 authorization endpoint:</p><div mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="callback-requirements">Your app must:</h3><ol class="list-decimal pl-5 mb-4 text-muted-foreground space-y-1"><li><strong>Verify the state</strong> — compare the <code>state</code> <!-- -->from the URL with the value you stored before the redirect. If they don&#x27;t match, abort — it may be a CSRF attack.</li><li><strong>Extract the code</strong> — read the <code>code</code> query parameter.</li></ol><div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-lg border flex gap-3 items-start bg-surface-primary text-foreground border-border [--alert-semantic:rgb(var(--foreground))] [--alert-highlight:rgb(var(--foreground)/0.1)] px-4 py-3 my-6"><div class="flex items-start shrink-0 pt-0.5"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-circle-check text-muted-foreground" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><path d="m9 12 2 2 4-4"></path></svg></div><div class="flex-1 min-w-0 flex flex-col gap-1"><h5 class="font-bold tracking-tight truncate text-sm" style="color:var(--alert-semantic)">The authorization code is single-use and expires quickly</h5><div class="font-normal min-w-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:bg-[var(--alert-highlight)] [&amp;_code]:text-[var(--alert-semantic)] [&amp;_code]:px-1 [&amp;_code]:py-0.5 [&amp;_code]:rounded [&amp;_code]:font-mono [&amp;_code]:text-[0.9em]">Exchange it immediately. Do not store or log authorization codes.</div></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="step-4-exchange-code">Step 4: Exchange code for tokens</h2><p class="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4">Make a POST request from your <strong>backend</strong> to the token endpoint. class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">=</span><span>access_denied</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">&amp;</span><span class="token assign-left" style="color:#9cdcfe">error_description</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">=</span><span>User+cancelled</span></code></pre></div></div><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="callback-requirements">Your app must:</h3><ol class="list-decimal pl-5 mb-4 text-muted-foreground space-y-1"><li><strong>Verify the state</strong> — compare the <code>state</code> <!-- -->from the URL with the value you stored before the redirect. If they don&#x27;t match, abort — it may be a CSRF attack.</li><li><strong>Extract the code</strong> — read the <code>code</code> query parameter.</li></ol><div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-lg border flex gap-3 items-start bg-surface-primary text-foreground border-border [--alert-semantic:rgb(var(--foreground))] [--alert-highlight:rgb(var(--foreground)/0.1)] px-4 py-3 my-6"><div class="flex items-start shrink-0 pt-0.5"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-circle-check text-muted-foreground" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><path d="m9 12 2 2 4-4"></path></svg></div><div class="flex-1 min-w-0 flex flex-col gap-1"><h5 class="font-bold tracking-tight truncate text-sm" style="color:var(--alert-semantic)">The authorization code is single-use and expires quickly</h5><div class="font-normal min-w-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:bg-[var(--alert-highlight)] [&amp;_code]:text-[var(--alert-semantic)] [&amp;_code]:px-1 [&amp;_code]:py-0.5 [&amp;_code]:rounded [&amp;_code]:font-mono [&amp;_code]:text-[0.9em]">Exchange it immediately. Do not store or log authorization codes.</div></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="step-4-exchange-code">Step 4: Exchange code for tokens</h2><p class="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4">Make a POST request from your <strong>backend</strong> to the token endpoint. Never perform the token exchange from the browser.</p><div data-code="POST https://auth.deriv.com/oauth2/token" data-lang="http" class="relative group my-4 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border text-muted-foreground">Where to find your values:</p><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b border-border"><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Value</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Where</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>client_id</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Register an OAuth2 app with Deriv — you&#x27;ll receive an app ID</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>redirect_uri</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Set during app registration — must match exactly</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>t / affiliate_token / sidi / ca (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your referral link or the Partners dashboard — use the exact parameter name shown there</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>utm_source / affiliate ID (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>utm_campaign (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>app_id (legacy)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your V1 app ID from legacy-api.deriv.com — only needed if you maintain a Legacy API app</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="troubleshooting">Troubleshooting</h2><div class="my-4"><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b border-border"><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Problem</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Likely cause</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Fix</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">State mismatch error</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">state in the callback doesn&#x27;t match stored value</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Store state in sessionStorage before redirecting, and don&#x27;t regenerate it on page load</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_grant on token exchange</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">code_verifier doesn&#x27;t match the challenge, or code expired/already used</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Send the original code_verifier, not a newly generated one; exchange the code immediately</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Redirect URI mismatch</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">URL doesn&#x27;t exactly match what&#x27;s registered</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Check for trailing slashes, http vs https, port numbers</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_client</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Wrong client_id</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your credentials from the Deriv dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Login form shows instead of signup</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing prompt=registration</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Add prompt=registration to the authorization URL</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Signup not tracked to partner</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing or wrong UTM parameters</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your tracking token parameter (one of t, affiliate_token, sidi, or ca) matches the one shown in your referral link, and that utm_source, utm_medium, and utm_campaign are all present and correct</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="implementation-checklist">Implementation checklist</h2><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="login-checklist">Login</h3><ul class="space-y-1.5 text-muted-foreground text-sm my-4 ml-2"><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">response_type</code> <!-- -->is<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">code</code></span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">client_id</code> <!-- -->and<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">redirect_uri</code> <!-- -->are registered with Deriv</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">code_challenge</code> <!-- -->and<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">state</code> <!-- -->are generated fresh for each request</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span>Callback verifies<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded inline-block"></span><span>Token exchange happens server-side (not in the browser)</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border text-muted-foreground">Where to find your values:</p><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b uppercase tracking-wide">Where</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>client_id</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Register an OAuth2 app with Deriv — you&#x27;ll receive an app ID</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>redirect_uri</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground whitespace-nowrap"><code>t / affiliate_token / sidi / ca (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your referral link or the Partners dashboard — ID (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>utm_campaign (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>app_id (legacy)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your V1 app ID from legacy-api.deriv.com — only needed if you maintain a Legacy API app</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="troubleshooting">Troubleshooting</h2><div class="my-4"><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b border-border"><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Problem</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Likely cause</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Fix</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">State mismatch error</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">state in the callback doesn&#x27;t match stored value</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Store state in sessionStorage before redirecting, and don&#x27;t regenerate it on page load</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_grant on token exchange</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">code_verifier doesn&#x27;t match the challenge, or code expired/already used</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Send the original code_verifier, not a newly generated one; exchange the code immediately</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Redirect URI mismatch</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">URL doesn&#x27;t exactly match what&#x27;s registered</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Check for trailing slashes, http vs https, port numbers</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_client</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Wrong client_id</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your credentials from the Deriv dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Login form shows instead of signup</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing prompt=registration</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Add prompt=registration to the authorization URL</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Signup not tracked to partner</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing or wrong UTM parameters</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your tracking token parameter (one of t, affiliate_token, sidi, or ca) matches the one shown in your referral link, and that utm_source, utm_medium, and utm_campaign are all present and correct</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="implementation-checklist">Implementation checklist</h2><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="login-checklist">Login</h3><ul class="space-y-1.5 text-muted-foreground text-sm my-4 ml-2"><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">response_type</code> <!-- -->is<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">code</code></span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 generated fresh for each request</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 Generate a random code_verifier\\nconst array = crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(64));\\nconst codeVerifier = Array.from(array)\\n  .map(v =\u003e 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789-._~'[v % 66])\\n  .join('');\\n\\n// 2.   34: </span><span></span><span class="token" style="color:#569CD6">const</span><span> hash </span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">=</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#c586c0">await</span><span> crypto</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token property-access">subtle</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">digest</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token" style="color:#ce9178">&#x27;SHA-256&#x27;</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">,</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#569CD6">new</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#4ec9b0">TextEncoder</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">encode</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span>codeVerifier</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">;</span><span>
  35: </span><span></span><span class="token" style="color:#569CD6">const</span><span> codeChallenge </span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">=</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#dcdcaa">btoa</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token known-class-name" style="color:#4ec9b0">String</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">fromCharCode</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token spread" style="color:#d4d4d4">...</span><span class="token" style="color:#569CD6">new</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#4ec9b0">Uint8Array</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span>hash</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span>
  36: </span><span>  </span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">replace</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token regex-delimiter" style="color:#d16969">/</span><span class="token regex-source language-regex special-escape" style="color:#d16969">\+</span><span class="token regex-delimiter" style="color:#d16969">/</span><span class="token regex-flags" style="color:#d16969">g</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">,</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#ce9178">&#x27;-&#x27;</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span>

-----------------------------------

  43: </span>

  45: </span><span></span><span class="token dom" style="color:#9cdcfe">sessionStorage</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">setItem</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token" style="color:#ce9178">&#x27;pkce_code_verifier&#x27;</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">,</span><span> codeVerifier</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">;</span><span>

text-muted-foreground mb-4">Required authorization request parameters:</p><ul class="list-disc pl-5 mb-4 text-muted-foreground space-y-1"><li>response_type=code</li><li>client_id</li><li>redirect_uri</li><li>scope</li><li>state</li><li>code_challenge + code_challenge_method=S256 (PKCE)</li></ul><div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-lg border flex gap-3 items-start bg-surface-primary text-foreground border-border [--alert-semantic:rgb(var(--foreground))] [--alert-highlight:rgb(var(--foreground)/0.1)] px-4 py-3 my-6"><div class="flex items-start shrink-0 pt-0.5"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" style="color:var(--alert-semantic)">Storage tip</h5><div class="font-normal min-w-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:bg-[var(--alert-highlight)] [&amp;_code]:text-[var(--alert-semantic)] [&amp;_code]:px-1 [&amp;_code]:py-0.5 [&amp;_code]:rounded [&amp;_code]:font-mono [&amp;_code]:text-[0.9em]">Store the <code>code_verifier</code> and <code>state</code> in<!-- --> <code>sessionStorage</code> before redirecting — they survive the redirect and are automatically cleared when the tab is closed. Clear them from storage immediately after a successful token exchange.</div></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="step-2-redirect">Step 2: Redirect the user to the authorization endpoint</h2><p class="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4">Send users to Deriv&#x27;s OAuth 2.0 authorization endpoint:</p><div mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="callback-requirements">Your app must:</h3><ol class="list-decimal pl-5 mb-4 text-muted-foreground space-y-1"><li><strong>Verify the state</strong> — compare the <code>state</code> <!-- -->from the URL with the value you stored before the redirect. If they don&#x27;t match, abort — it may be a CSRF attack.</li><li><strong>Extract the code</strong> — read the <code>code</code> query parameter.</li></ol><div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-lg border flex gap-3 items-start bg-surface-primary text-foreground border-border [--alert-semantic:rgb(var(--foreground))] [--alert-highlight:rgb(var(--foreground)/0.1)] px-4 py-3 my-6"><div class="flex items-start shrink-0 pt-0.5"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-circle-check text-muted-foreground" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><path d="m9 12 2 2 4-4"></path></svg></div><div class="flex-1 min-w-0 flex flex-col gap-1"><h5 class="font-bold tracking-tight truncate text-sm" style="color:var(--alert-semantic)">The authorization code is single-use and expires quickly</h5><div class="font-normal min-w-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:bg-[var(--alert-highlight)] [&amp;_code]:text-[var(--alert-semantic)] [&amp;_code]:px-1 [&amp;_code]:py-0.5 [&amp;_code]:rounded [&amp;_code]:font-mono [&amp;_code]:text-[0.9em]">Exchange it immediately. Do not store or log authorization codes.</div></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="step-4-exchange-code">Step 4: Exchange code for tokens</h2><p class="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4">Make a POST request from your <strong>backend</strong> to the token endpoint. class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">=</span><span>access_denied</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">&amp;</span><span class="token assign-left" style="color:#9cdcfe">error_description</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">=</span><span>User+cancelled</span></code></pre></div></div><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="callback-requirements">Your app must:</h3><ol class="list-decimal pl-5 mb-4 text-muted-foreground space-y-1"><li><strong>Verify the state</strong> — compare the <code>state</code> <!-- -->from the URL with the value you stored before the redirect. If they don&#x27;t match, abort — it may be a CSRF attack.</li><li><strong>Extract the code</strong> — read the <code>code</code> query parameter.</li></ol><div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-lg border flex gap-3 items-start bg-surface-primary text-foreground border-border [--alert-semantic:rgb(var(--foreground))] [--alert-highlight:rgb(var(--foreground)/0.1)] px-4 py-3 my-6"><div class="flex items-start shrink-0 pt-0.5"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-circle-check text-muted-foreground" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><path d="m9 12 2 2 4-4"></path></svg></div><div class="flex-1 min-w-0 flex flex-col gap-1"><h5 class="font-bold tracking-tight truncate text-sm" style="color:var(--alert-semantic)">The authorization code is single-use and expires quickly</h5><div class="font-normal min-w-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:bg-[var(--alert-highlight)] [&amp;_code]:text-[var(--alert-semantic)] [&amp;_code]:px-1 [&amp;_code]:py-0.5 [&amp;_code]:rounded [&amp;_code]:font-mono [&amp;_code]:text-[0.9em]">Exchange it immediately. Do not store or log authorization codes.</div></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="step-4-exchange-code">Step 4: Exchange code for tokens</h2><p class="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4">Make a POST request from your <strong>backend</strong> to the token endpoint. Never perform the token exchange from the browser.</p><div data-code="POST https://auth.deriv.com/oauth2/token" data-lang="http" class="relative group my-4 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border text-muted-foreground">Where to find your values:</p><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b border-border"><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Value</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Where</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>client_id</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Register an OAuth2 app with Deriv — you&#x27;ll receive an app ID</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>redirect_uri</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Set during app registration — must match exactly</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>t / affiliate_token / sidi / ca (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your referral link or the Partners dashboard — use the exact parameter name shown there</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>utm_source / affiliate ID (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>utm_campaign (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>app_id (legacy)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your V1 app ID from legacy-api.deriv.com — only needed if you maintain a Legacy API app</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="troubleshooting">Troubleshooting</h2><div class="my-4"><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b border-border"><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Problem</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Likely cause</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Fix</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">State mismatch error</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">state in the callback doesn&#x27;t match stored value</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Store state in sessionStorage before redirecting, and don&#x27;t regenerate it on page load</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_grant on token exchange</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">code_verifier doesn&#x27;t match the challenge, or code expired/already used</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Send the original code_verifier, not a newly generated one; exchange the code immediately</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Redirect URI mismatch</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">URL doesn&#x27;t exactly match what&#x27;s registered</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Check for trailing slashes, http vs https, port numbers</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_client</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Wrong client_id</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your credentials from the Deriv dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Login form shows instead of signup</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing prompt=registration</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Add prompt=registration to the authorization URL</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Signup not tracked to partner</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing or wrong UTM parameters</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your tracking token parameter (one of t, affiliate_token, sidi, or ca) matches the one shown in your referral link, and that utm_source, utm_medium, and utm_campaign are all present and correct</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="implementation-checklist">Implementation checklist</h2><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="login-checklist">Login</h3><ul class="space-y-1.5 text-muted-foreground text-sm my-4 ml-2"><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">response_type</code> <!-- -->is<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">code</code></span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">client_id</code> <!-- -->and<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">redirect_uri</code> <!-- -->are registered with Deriv</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border generated fresh for each request</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span>Callback verifies<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded inline-block"></span><span>Token exchange happens server-side (not in the browser)</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border text-muted-foreground">Where to find your values:</p><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b uppercase tracking-wide">Where</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>client_id</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Register an OAuth2 app with Deriv — you&#x27;ll receive an app ID</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>redirect_uri</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground whitespace-nowrap"><code>t / affiliate_token / sidi / ca (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your referral link or the Partners dashboard — ID (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>utm_campaign (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>app_id (legacy)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your V1 app ID from legacy-api.deriv.com — only needed if you maintain a Legacy API app</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="troubleshooting">Troubleshooting</h2><div class="my-4"><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b border-border"><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Problem</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Likely cause</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Fix</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">State mismatch error</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">state in the callback doesn&#x27;t match stored value</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Store state in sessionStorage before redirecting, and don&#x27;t regenerate it on page load</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_grant on token exchange</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">code_verifier doesn&#x27;t match the challenge, or code expired/already used</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Send the original code_verifier, not a newly generated one; exchange the code immediately</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Redirect URI mismatch</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">URL doesn&#x27;t exactly match what&#x27;s registered</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Check for trailing slashes, http vs https, port numbers</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_client</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Wrong client_id</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your credentials from the Deriv dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Login form shows instead of signup</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing prompt=registration</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Add prompt=registration to the authorization URL</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Signup not tracked to partner</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing or wrong UTM parameters</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your tracking token parameter (one of t, affiliate_token, sidi, or ca) matches the one shown in your referral link, and that utm_source, utm_medium, and utm_campaign are all present and correct</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="implementation-checklist">Implementation checklist</h2><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="login-checklist">Login</h3><ul class="space-y-1.5 text-muted-foreground text-sm my-4 ml-2"><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">response_type</code> <!-- -->is<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">code</code></span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 generated fresh for each request</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span>Callback verifies<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded Generate a random code_verifier\\nconst array = crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(64));\\nconst codeVerifier = Array.from(array)\\n  .map(v =\u003e 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789-._~'[v % 66])\\n  .join('');\\n\\n// 2.   34: </span><span></span><span class="token" style="color:#569CD6">const</span><span> hash </span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">=</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#c586c0">await</span><span> crypto</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token property-access">subtle</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">digest</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token" style="color:#ce9178">&#x27;SHA-256&#x27;</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">,</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#569CD6">new</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#4ec9b0">TextEncoder</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">encode</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span>codeVerifier</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">;</span><span>
  35: </span><span></span><span class="token" style="color:#569CD6">const</span><span> codeChallenge </span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">=</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#dcdcaa">btoa</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token known-class-name" style="color:#4ec9b0">String</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">fromCharCode</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token spread" style="color:#d4d4d4">...</span><span class="token" style="color:#569CD6">new</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#4ec9b0">Uint8Array</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span>hash</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span>
  36: </span><span>  </span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">replace</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token regex-delimiter" style="color:#d16969">/</span><span class="token regex-source language-regex special-escape" style="color:#d16969">\+</span><span class="token regex-delimiter" style="color:#d16969">/</span><span class="token regex-flags" style="color:#d16969">g</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">,</span><span> </span><span class="token" style="color:#ce9178">&#x27;-&#x27;</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span>

-----------------------------------

  43: </span>

  45: </span><span></span><span class="token dom" style="color:#9cdcfe">sessionStorage</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">.</span><span class="token method property-access" style="color:#dcdcaa">setItem</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">(</span><span class="token" style="color:#ce9178">&#x27;pkce_code_verifier&#x27;</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">,</span><span> codeVerifier</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">)</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">;</span><span>

text-muted-foreground mb-4">Required authorization request parameters:</p><ul class="list-disc pl-5 mb-4 text-muted-foreground space-y-1"><li>response_type=code</li><li>client_id</li><li>redirect_uri</li><li>scope</li><li>state</li><li>code_challenge + code_challenge_method=S256 (PKCE)</li></ul><div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-lg border flex gap-3 items-start bg-surface-primary text-foreground border-border [--alert-semantic:rgb(var(--foreground))] [--alert-highlight:rgb(var(--foreground)/0.1)] px-4 py-3 my-6"><div class="flex items-start shrink-0 pt-0.5"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" style="color:var(--alert-semantic)">Storage tip</h5><div class="font-normal min-w-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:bg-[var(--alert-highlight)] [&amp;_code]:text-[var(--alert-semantic)] [&amp;_code]:px-1 [&amp;_code]:py-0.5 [&amp;_code]:rounded [&amp;_code]:font-mono [&amp;_code]:text-[0.9em]">Store the <code>code_verifier</code> and <code>state</code> in<!-- --> <code>sessionStorage</code> before redirecting — they survive the redirect and are automatically cleared when the tab is closed. Clear them from storage immediately after a successful token exchange.</div></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="step-2-redirect">Step 2: Redirect the user to the authorization endpoint</h2><p class="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4">Send users to Deriv&#x27;s OAuth 2.0 authorization endpoint:</p><div mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="callback-requirements">Your app must:</h3><ol class="list-decimal pl-5 mb-4 text-muted-foreground space-y-1"><li><strong>Verify the state</strong> — compare the <code>state</code> <!-- -->from the URL with the value you stored before the redirect. If they don&#x27;t match, abort — it may be a CSRF attack.</li><li><strong>Extract the code</strong> — read the <code>code</code> query parameter.</li></ol><div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-lg border flex gap-3 items-start bg-surface-primary text-foreground border-border [--alert-semantic:rgb(var(--foreground))] [--alert-highlight:rgb(var(--foreground)/0.1)] px-4 py-3 my-6"><div class="flex items-start shrink-0 pt-0.5"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-circle-check text-muted-foreground" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><path d="m9 12 2 2 4-4"></path></svg></div><div class="flex-1 min-w-0 flex flex-col gap-1"><h5 class="font-bold tracking-tight truncate text-sm" style="color:var(--alert-semantic)">The authorization code is single-use and expires quickly</h5><div class="font-normal min-w-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:bg-[var(--alert-highlight)] [&amp;_code]:text-[var(--alert-semantic)] [&amp;_code]:px-1 [&amp;_code]:py-0.5 [&amp;_code]:rounded [&amp;_code]:font-mono [&amp;_code]:text-[0.9em]">Exchange it immediately. Do not store or log authorization codes.</div></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="step-4-exchange-code">Step 4: Exchange code for tokens</h2><p class="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4">Make a POST request from your <strong>backend</strong> to the token endpoint. class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">=</span><span>access_denied</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">&amp;</span><span class="token assign-left" style="color:#9cdcfe">error_description</span><span class="token" style="color:#d4d4d4">=</span><span>User+cancelled</span></code></pre></div></div><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="callback-requirements">Your app must:</h3><ol class="list-decimal pl-5 mb-4 text-muted-foreground space-y-1"><li><strong>Verify the state</strong> — compare the <code>state</code> <!-- -->from the URL with the value you stored before the redirect. If they don&#x27;t match, abort — it may be a CSRF attack.</li><li><strong>Extract the code</strong> — read the <code>code</code> query parameter.</li></ol><div role="alert" class="relative w-full rounded-lg border flex gap-3 items-start bg-surface-primary text-foreground border-border [--alert-semantic:rgb(var(--foreground))] [--alert-highlight:rgb(var(--foreground)/0.1)] px-4 py-3 my-6"><div class="flex items-start shrink-0 pt-0.5"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" class="lucide lucide-circle-check text-muted-foreground" aria-hidden="true"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><path d="m9 12 2 2 4-4"></path></svg></div><div class="flex-1 min-w-0 flex flex-col gap-1"><h5 class="font-bold tracking-tight truncate text-sm" style="color:var(--alert-semantic)">The authorization code is single-use and expires quickly</h5><div class="font-normal min-w-0 text-sm [&amp;_code]:bg-[var(--alert-highlight)] [&amp;_code]:text-[var(--alert-semantic)] [&amp;_code]:px-1 [&amp;_code]:py-0.5 [&amp;_code]:rounded [&amp;_code]:font-mono [&amp;_code]:text-[0.9em]">Exchange it immediately. Do not store or log authorization codes.</div></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="step-4-exchange-code">Step 4: Exchange code for tokens</h2><p class="text-base text-muted-foreground mb-4">Make a POST request from your <strong>backend</strong> to the token endpoint. Never perform the token exchange from the browser.</p><div data-code="POST https://auth.deriv.com/oauth2/token" data-lang="http" class="relative group my-4 rounded-xl overflow-hidden border min-w-[120px]"><code>https://auth.deriv.com/oauth2/token</code></td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">API text-muted-foreground">Where to find your values:</p><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b border-border"><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Value</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Where</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>client_id</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Register an OAuth2 app with Deriv — you&#x27;ll receive an app ID</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>redirect_uri</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Set during app registration — must match exactly</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>t / affiliate_token / sidi / ca (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your referral link or the Partners dashboard — use the exact parameter name shown there</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>utm_source / affiliate ID (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>utm_campaign (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>app_id (legacy)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your V1 app ID from legacy-api.deriv.com — only needed if you maintain a Legacy API app</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="troubleshooting">Troubleshooting</h2><div class="my-4"><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b border-border"><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Problem</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Likely cause</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Fix</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">State mismatch error</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">state in the callback doesn&#x27;t match stored value</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Store state in sessionStorage before redirecting, and don&#x27;t regenerate it on page load</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_grant on token exchange</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">code_verifier doesn&#x27;t match the challenge, or code expired/already used</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Send the original code_verifier, not a newly generated one; exchange the code immediately</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Redirect URI mismatch</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">URL doesn&#x27;t exactly match what&#x27;s registered</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Check for trailing slashes, http vs https, port numbers</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_client</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Wrong client_id</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your credentials from the Deriv dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Login form shows instead of signup</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing prompt=registration</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Add prompt=registration to the authorization URL</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Signup not tracked to partner</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing or wrong UTM parameters</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your tracking token parameter (one of t, affiliate_token, sidi, or ca) matches the one shown in your referral link, and that utm_source, utm_medium, and utm_campaign are all present and correct</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="implementation-checklist">Implementation checklist</h2><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="login-checklist">Login</h3><ul class="space-y-1.5 text-muted-foreground text-sm my-4 ml-2"><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">response_type</code> <!-- -->is<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">code</code></span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">client_id</code> <!-- -->and<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">redirect_uri</code> <!-- -->are registered with Deriv</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">code_challenge</code> <!-- -->and<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">state</code> <!-- -->are generated fresh for each request</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">code_verifier</code> <!-- -->is stored in<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">sessionStorage</code> <!-- -->before redirect</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span>Callback verifies<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded inline-block"></span><span>Token exchange happens server-side (not in the browser)</span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border set to your Legacy app ID (optional)</span></li></ul><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="signup-checklist">Sign Up (additional)</h3><ul class="space-y-1.5 text-muted-foreground">Where to find your values:</p><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b
