uppercase tracking-wide">Where</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>client_id</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Register an OAuth2 app with Deriv — you&#x27;ll receive an app ID</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>redirect_uri</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground whitespace-nowrap"><code>t / affiliate_token / sidi / ca (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your referral link or the Partners dashboard — ID (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>utm_campaign (signup)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Managed and set in the Partners dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap"><code>app_id (legacy)</code></td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Your V1 app ID from legacy-api.deriv.com — only needed if you maintain a Legacy API app</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="troubleshooting">Troubleshooting</h2><div class="my-4"><div class="w-full overflow-x-auto rounded-xl border border-border scrollbar-thin scrollbar-thumb-border scrollbar-track-transparent"><table class="w-full min-w-[600px] caption-bottom text-sm border-collapse"><thead class="[&amp;_tr]:border-b [&amp;_tr]:border-border bg-slate-1200/10 dark:bg-slate-1200"><tr class="border-b border-border"><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Problem</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Likely cause</th><th class="h-10 px-4 text-left text-xs font-semibold text-muted-foreground uppercase tracking-wide">Fix</th></tr></thead><tbody class="[&amp;_tr:last-child]:border-0"><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">State mismatch error</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">state in the callback doesn&#x27;t match stored value</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Store state in sessionStorage before redirecting, and don&#x27;t regenerate it on page load</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_grant on token exchange</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">code_verifier doesn&#x27;t match the challenge, or code expired/already used</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Send the original code_verifier, not a newly generated one; exchange the code immediately</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Redirect URI mismatch</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">URL doesn&#x27;t exactly match what&#x27;s registered</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Check for trailing slashes, http vs https, port numbers</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">invalid_client</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Wrong client_id</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your credentials from the Deriv dashboard</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Login form shows instead of signup</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing prompt=registration</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Add prompt=registration to the authorization URL</td></tr><tr class="border-b border-border"><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm font-medium text-foreground align-top whitespace-nowrap">Signup not tracked to partner</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Missing or wrong UTM parameters</td><td class="px-4 py-3 text-sm text-muted-foreground align-top min-w-[120px]">Verify your tracking token parameter (one of t, affiliate_token, sidi, or ca) matches the one shown in your referral link, and that utm_source, utm_medium, and utm_campaign are all present and correct</td></tr></tbody></table></div></div><h2 class="text-xl font-semibold text-foreground mt-10 mb-4 scroll-mt-24" id="implementation-checklist">Implementation checklist</h2><h3 class="text-lg font-semibold text-foreground mt-8 mb-3 scroll-mt-24" id="login-checklist">Login</h3><ul class="space-y-1.5 text-muted-foreground text-sm my-4 ml-2"><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 shrink-0 rounded border border-border inline-block"></span><span><code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">response_type</code> <!-- -->is<!-- --> <code class="bg-muted px-1 py-0.5 rounded text-xs">code</code></span></li><li class="flex items-start gap-2"><span class="mt-0.5 h-4 w-4 Generate a random code_verifier\\nconst array = crypto.getRandomValues(new Uint8Array(64));\\nconst codeVerifier = Array.from(array)\\n  .map(v =\u003e 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz0123456789-._~'[v % 66])\\n  .join('');\\n\\n// 2.
